name: @commonality/worker-host
description: Host process for bundling multiple AI background workers under one supervisor

scripts.predev: npm run build --workspace=@commonality/implication-finder && npm run build --workspace=@commonality/content-finder && npm run build --workspace=@commonality/implication-graph-nudger && npm run build --workspace=@commonality/bridge-creator && npm run build --workspace=@commonality/explorer-curator
